# Lyrebird reference

Auto-generated from `src/lyrebird/events.py` and `detections/sigma/`. It cannot
drift from the code — a test (`tests/test_reference.py`) fails if this file is
stale. Regenerate with `python scripts/gen_reference.py`.

## Event schema (v1.0)

Every emulated interaction is one JSON object on one line. This is the contract
the log files, SIEM ingestion, the analysis layer, and every Sigma rule key off.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `service` | `str` | yes | "http", "dns", "smtp", ... |
| `transport` | `str` | yes | "tcp" \| "udp" |
| `src_ip` | `str` | yes |  |
| `src_port` | `int` | yes |  |
| `dst_port` | `int` | yes |  |
| `event_type` | `str` | yes | "connection" \| "request" \| "auth" \| "capture" |
| `summary` | `str` | no |  |
| `request` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |  |
| `response` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |  |
| `artifacts` | `list[Artifact]` | no |  |
| `tags` | `list[str]` | no |  |
| `schema` | `str` | no |  |
| `ts` | `str` | no |  |
| `event_id` | `str` | no |  |
| `session` | `str` | no |  |

### Artifact

Captured payloads (uploads, mail bodies, raw socket data) are hashed, stored, and
referenced from an event's `artifacts` array.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kind` | `str` | yes | "upload", "mail", "dns_query", "binary", ... |
| `path` | `str` | yes | where it was stored on disk |
| `sha256` | `str` | yes |  |
| `size` | `int` | yes |  |
| `note` | `str` | no |  |

## Detection catalog

Each rule selects on a tag the emulator emits (see the event schema's `tags`).
Levels are shipped defaults — tune to your environment.

| Rule | Service | Selects on | Level |
|---|---|---|---|
| Repeated Requests From Single Source To Emulator (Beacon Base) | `—` | `—` | informational |
| High-Frequency Beaconing From Single Source (Possible C2) | `—` | `correlation (event_count)` | medium |
| Suspicious Long DNS Label Against Lab Emulator (Possible DGA / Tunneling) | `dns` | `tags=long-label` | medium |
| DNS Resolution For Non-Existent Domain (Possible Sandbox-Detection Probe) | `dns` | `tags=sandbox-probe` | medium |
| File Upload To Lab Emulator Over FTP/TFTP (Possible Exfil or Drop) | `—` | `tags=upload` | medium |
| HTTP Request With Missing User-Agent To Lab Emulator (Possible Beacon) | `http` | `tags=missing-user-agent` | low |
| Beacon-Like HTTP Request To Frontable CDN Host (Possible Domain Fronting) | `http` | `tags=missing-user-agent` | medium |
| HTTP Request Carrying Outbound Body To Lab Emulator (Possible Exfil / Check-In) | `http` | `tags=data-out` | low |
| HTTP Request With Automation User-Agent To Lab Emulator (Possible Beacon) | `http` | `tags=suspicious-user-agent` | medium |
| IMAP IDLE Used By Sample (Possible Mailbox C2 Long-Poll) | `imap` | `tags=imap-idle` | medium |
| IRC Channel Join Observed By Lab Emulator (Possible Botnet C2) | `irc` | `tags=channel-join` | high |
| Bulk-Recipient Mail Captured By Lab Emulator (Possible Mass Mailer) | `smtp` | `tags=bulk-recipients` | medium |
| SSH Brute-Force By Sample (Credential Guessing / Lateral Movement) | `ssh` | `tags=ssh-bruteforce` | medium |
| Second-Stage Payload Pull Over SSH Shell | `ssh` | `tags=ssh-payload-pull` | high |
| Known-Bad TLS Client Fingerprint (JA3/JA4) Seen By Emulator | `tls_capture` | `request.ja3=REPLACE_WITH_KNOWN_BAD_JA3; request.ja4=REPLACE_WITH_KNOWN_BAD_JA4` | high |
| TLS 1.3 ClientHello Without GREASE (Possible Automation or Malware) | `—` | `tags=no-grease` | medium |
| TLS SNI/Host Mismatch Observed By Emulator (Possible Domain Fronting) | `tls` | `tags=sni-host-mismatch` | high |
